channel.title: Homelab Documentation – Arr-Stack;community-Script
channel.description: Recent content in Arr-Stack;community-Script on Homelab Documentation

item.title: flaresolverr
item.description:
Summary

  • VMID: 105
  • Type: LXC
  • Status: running
  • Node: pve
  • CPU: 1
  • RAM: 0.5 GB
  • Disk: 3.86 GB
  • On Boot: 1
  • Startup: n/a
  • Tags: arr-stack;community-script

Network

Interface Config
net0 name=eth0,bridge=vmbr0,hwaddr=BC:24:11:74:17:A9,ip=dhcp,type=veth

Storage

Device Config
rootfs TGroup1:vm-105-disk-0,size=4G

Description

FlareSolverr LXC

Raw Config Snapshot 

{
  "arch": "amd64",
  "cores": 1,
  "description": "<div align='center'><a href='https://Helper-Scripts.com' target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'><img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tteck/Proxmox/main/misc/images/logo-81x112.png'/></a>\n\n  # FlareSolverr LXC\n\n  <a href='https://ko-fi.com/proxmoxhelperscripts'><img src='https://img.shields.io/badge/☕-Buy me a coffee-blue' /></a>\n  </div>\n",
  "digest": "30303e1ee642f4031fae98e4fe3a7dd1dff02c2d",
  "features": "nesting=1",
  "hostname": "flaresolverr",
  "lxc": [
    [
      "lxc.cgroup2.devices.allow",
      "a"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.cap.drop",
      ""
    ],
    [
      "lxc.cgroup2.devices.allow",
      "c 188:* rwm"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.cgroup2.devices.allow",
      "c 189:* rwm"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/serial/by-id  dev/serial/by-id  none bind,optional,create=dir"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyUSB0       dev/ttyUSB0       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyUSB1       dev/ttyUSB1       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyACM0       dev/ttyACM0       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyACM1       dev/ttyACM1       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ]
  ],
  "memory": 512,
  "net0": "name=eth0,bridge=vmbr0,hwaddr=BC:24:11:74:17:A9,ip=dhcp,type=veth",
  "onboot": 1,
  "ostype": "debian",
  "rootfs": "TGroup1:vm-105-disk-0,size=4G",
  "swap": 512,
  "tags": "arr-stack;community-script"
}

Notes

  • Add manual operational notes here.

item.title: prowlarr
item.description:
Summary

  • VMID: 104
  • Type: LXC
  • Status: running
  • Node: pve
  • CPU: 2
  • RAM: 1.0 GB
  • Disk: 3.86 GB
  • On Boot: 1
  • Startup: n/a
  • Tags: arr-stack;community-script

Network

Interface Config
net0 name=eth0,bridge=vmbr0,hwaddr=BC:24:11:EB:21:2F,ip=dhcp,type=veth

Storage

Device Config
rootfs TGroup1:vm-104-disk-0,size=4G

Description

Prowlarr LXC

Raw Config Snapshot 

{
  "arch": "amd64",
  "cores": 2,
  "description": "<div align='center'><a href='https://Helper-Scripts.com' target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'><img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tteck/Proxmox/main/misc/images/logo-81x112.png'/></a>\n\n  # Prowlarr LXC\n\n  <a href='https://ko-fi.com/proxmoxhelperscripts'><img src='https://img.shields.io/badge/☕-Buy me a coffee-blue' /></a>\n  </div>\n",
  "digest": "27f321023dfc35c748f21a3f834c437221920d79",
  "features": "nesting=1",
  "hostname": "prowlarr",
  "lxc": [
    [
      "lxc.cgroup2.devices.allow",
      "a"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.cap.drop",
      ""
    ],
    [
      "lxc.cgroup2.devices.allow",
      "c 188:* rwm"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.cgroup2.devices.allow",
      "c 189:* rwm"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/serial/by-id  dev/serial/by-id  none bind,optional,create=dir"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyUSB0       dev/ttyUSB0       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyUSB1       dev/ttyUSB1       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyACM0       dev/ttyACM0       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyACM1       dev/ttyACM1       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ]
  ],
  "memory": 1024,
  "net0": "name=eth0,bridge=vmbr0,hwaddr=BC:24:11:EB:21:2F,ip=dhcp,type=veth",
  "onboot": 1,
  "ostype": "debian",
  "rootfs": "TGroup1:vm-104-disk-0,size=4G",
  "swap": 512,
  "tags": "arr-stack;community-script"
}

Notes

  • Add manual operational notes here.

item.title: radarr
item.description:
Summary

  • VMID: 102
  • Type: LXC
  • Status: running
  • Node: pve
  • CPU: 2
  • RAM: 1.0 GB
  • Disk: 13.68 GB
  • On Boot: 1
  • Startup: n/a
  • Tags: arr-stack;community-script

Network

Interface Config
net0 name=eth0,bridge=vmbr0,hwaddr=BC:24:11:2E:3A:50,ip=dhcp,type=veth

Storage

Device Config
mp0 /mnt/data/,mp=/data
rootfs TGroup1:vm-102-disk-0,size=14G

Description

Radarr LXC

Raw Config Snapshot 

{
  "arch": "amd64",
  "cores": 2,
  "description": "<div align='center'><a href='https://Helper-Scripts.com' target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'><img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tteck/Proxmox/main/misc/images/logo-81x112.png'/></a>\n\n  # Radarr LXC\n\n  <a href='https://ko-fi.com/proxmoxhelperscripts'><img src='https://img.shields.io/badge/☕-Buy me a coffee-blue' /></a>\n  </div>\n",
  "digest": "9ac8956e7fb608620a0455b8a44c022a6dd615ac",
  "features": "mount=nfs,nesting=1",
  "hostname": "radarr",
  "lxc": [
    [
      "lxc.cgroup2.devices.allow",
      "a"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.cap.drop",
      ""
    ],
    [
      "lxc.cgroup2.devices.allow",
      "c 188:* rwm"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.cgroup2.devices.allow",
      "c 189:* rwm"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/serial/by-id  dev/serial/by-id  none bind,optional,create=dir"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyUSB0       dev/ttyUSB0       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyUSB1       dev/ttyUSB1       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyACM0       dev/ttyACM0       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyACM1       dev/ttyACM1       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ]
  ],
  "memory": 1024,
  "mp0": "/mnt/data/,mp=/data",
  "net0": "name=eth0,bridge=vmbr0,hwaddr=BC:24:11:2E:3A:50,ip=dhcp,type=veth",
  "onboot": 1,
  "ostype": "debian",
  "rootfs": "TGroup1:vm-102-disk-0,size=14G",
  "swap": 512,
  "tags": "arr-stack;community-script"
}

Notes

  • Add manual operational notes here.

item.title: sonarr
item.description:
Summary

  • VMID: 101
  • Type: LXC
  • Status: running
  • Node: pve
  • CPU: 2
  • RAM: 1.0 GB
  • Disk: 3.86 GB
  • On Boot: 1
  • Startup: n/a
  • Tags: arr-stack;community-script

Network

Interface Config
net0 name=eth0,bridge=vmbr0,hwaddr=BC:24:11:3E:91:87,ip=dhcp,type=veth

Storage

Device Config
mp0 /mnt/data/,mp=/data
rootfs TGroup1:vm-101-disk-0,size=4G

Description

Sonarr LXC

Raw Config Snapshot 

{
  "arch": "amd64",
  "cores": 2,
  "description": "<div align='center'><a href='https://Helper-Scripts.com' target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'><img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tteck/Proxmox/main/misc/images/logo-81x112.png'/></a>\n\n  # Sonarr LXC\n\n  <a href='https://ko-fi.com/proxmoxhelperscripts'><img src='https://img.shields.io/badge/☕-Buy me a coffee-blue' /></a>\n  </div>\n",
  "digest": "56b1f1be7c8fd2ece05473164018d17b5e3f4a16",
  "features": "mount=nfs,nesting=1",
  "hostname": "sonarr",
  "lxc": [
    [
      "lxc.cgroup2.devices.allow",
      "a"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.cap.drop",
      ""
    ],
    [
      "lxc.cgroup2.devices.allow",
      "c 188:* rwm"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.cgroup2.devices.allow",
      "c 189:* rwm"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/serial/by-id  dev/serial/by-id  none bind,optional,create=dir"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyUSB0       dev/ttyUSB0       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyUSB1       dev/ttyUSB1       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyACM0       dev/ttyACM0       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ],
    [
      "lxc.mount.entry",
      "/dev/ttyACM1       dev/ttyACM1       none bind,optional,create=file"
    ]
  ],
  "memory": 1024,
  "mp0": "/mnt/data/,mp=/data",
  "net0": "name=eth0,bridge=vmbr0,hwaddr=BC:24:11:3E:91:87,ip=dhcp,type=veth",
  "onboot": 1,
  "ostype": "debian",
  "rootfs": "TGroup1:vm-101-disk-0,size=4G",
  "swap": 512,
  "tags": "arr-stack;community-script"
}

Notes

  • Add manual operational notes here.
